rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior TV advertising–search–sales work by modeling online search as a mediator of sales effects, which closely matches the cited paper’s core contribution on direct/indirect advertising effects through paid-search intermediaries and online/offline sales. Given this strong construct and mechanism overlap (plus an exact DOI match: 10.1509/jmr.11.0466), this is plausibly a substantive prior-method/mechanism reference rather than an incidental mention.
